body:
**Severity**: LOW (doc-only, no functional impact)
**Source audit**: docs/audits/AUDIT_FO3_2026-05-01.md
**Game affected**: Fallout 3 — discoverability gap

## Summary

The CLI Usage block in [CLAUDE.md:210-217](CLAUDE.md#L210-L217) lists FNV interior / exterior examples (`--esm FalloutNV.esm`) and a Skyrim+DLC example, but no FO3 example. The same flag set works for `--esm Fallout3.esm --cell Megaton01 ...`. ROADMAP claims FO3 Tier-1 "Megaton 929 REFRs" — the canonical command for that bench is undocumented in the developer-facing CLAUDE.md.

```
Usage:
  cargo run -- path/to/mesh.nif — render a loose NIF file
  cargo run -- mesh.nif --kf anim.kf — play animation on a mesh
  cargo run -- --bsa path.bsa --mesh meshes\\foo.nif — extract from BSA and render
  cargo run -- --bsa meshes.bsa --mesh meshes\\foo.nif --textures-bsa textures.bsa — with textures
  cargo run -- --esm FalloutNV.esm --cell CellID --bsa Meshes.bsa --textures-bsa Textures.bsa — cell
  cargo run -- --esm FalloutNV.esm --grid 0,0 --radius 3 --bsa … — exterior grid
  cargo run -- --master Skyrim.esm --esm Dawnguard.esm --cell ForebearsHoldoutInt01 --bsa … — DLC interior
```

## Game impact

Doc-only. Future contributors may infer FO3 isn't supported via `--esm` from the absence; no functional impact on existing builds.

## Suggested Fix

Add one line to the Usage block (between the FNV cell example and the FNV grid example):

```
cargo run -- --esm Fallout3.esm --cell Megaton01 --bsa "Fallout - Meshes.bsa" --textures-bsa "Fallout - Textures.bsa" — FO3 interior cell
```

## Completeness Checks

- [ ] **UNSAFE**: N/A
- [ ] **SIBLING**: Confirm Oblivion + FO4 + FO76 + Starfield all have at least one Usage example (or document Tier-2+ status if intentional).
- [ ] **DROP**: N/A
- [ ] **LOCK_ORDER**: N/A
- [ ] **FFI**: N/A
- [ ] **TESTS**: N/A (doc-only).
title: FO3-6-02: CLAUDE.md Usage block lacks FO3 cli example
